articles.title: Dollar hovers around 10-day low as US, Iran reach peace deal
articles.headline: Dollar hits 10-day low as US, Iran reach peace deal
articles.author: Sophie Kiderlin, Jiaxing Li, Ankur Banerjee
articles.summary: U.S. dollar traded near 10-day low after U.S. and Iran reached preliminary peace agreement. DXY at 99.52. Oil slumped (Brent -5% to $82.9). EUR +0.32% to $1.1605. Fed expected to hold at 3.50-3.75%, BOJ expected to hike to 1.00%. CME FedWatch shows December hike probability dropped to ~50% from >70%.

articles.title: Dollar hits 10-day low as US, Iran reach peace deal
articles.headline: Dollar hits 10-day low as US, Iran reach peace deal
articles.author: Reuters/CNBC
articles.summary: US-Iran peace deal framework agreed Sunday. Brent crude -4% to $83.82. DXY -0.31% to 99.492 (weakest since June 5). EUR +0.35% to $1.1607. JPY weakened to 160.150. BOJ set to raise rates to 31-year high. Trump warned of restarting attacks without nuclear accord.

articles.title: What Happened Overnight – Monday 15th June 2026
articles.headline: Global equities rally on US-Iran tentative peace deal
articles.author: Abm
articles.summary: Global equity markets rallied after US-Iran tentative peace deal including Strait of Hormuz reopening. Nikkei +5%, Kospi +5%, CSI 300 +1.9%, Hang Seng +0.5%. DAX +1.6%, FTSE 100 +0.8%. Brent crude -4.7% to ~$83. Trump: 'Ships of the World, start your engines. Let the oil flow!'

articles.title: Stock market today: U.S. stock futures jump on Iran deal; Nikkei surges 5%
articles.headline: US stock futures jump on Iran deal to end the war; Japan's Nikkei surges 5%
articles.author: CNBC
articles.summary: Dow futures +0.85%, S&P 500 futures +1.19%, Nasdaq 100 futures +2.00%. Nikkei +4.99% (record intraday high), Kospi +5.20%. WTI -4.8% to $80.80, Brent -3.9% to $83.89. SpaceX IPO aftermath: opened $150, retail bought $118M. Fed meeting this week: 98% probability of hold. Friday June 19 markets closed for Juneteenth.

articles.title: Markets cheer U.S.-Iran agreement, but some investors caution deal is yet to be signed
articles.headline: Markets cheer U.S.-Iran agreement, but caution lingers on unsigned deal
articles.author: Lee Ying Shan
articles.summary: WTI $80.83 (-4.77%), Brent $83.77 (-4%). DXY 99.483 (-0.32%). 10Y yield 4.423% (-5bps). Spot gold $4,302 (+2%) — contrarian bid signals distrust. Deal not signed until June 19. CBA expects Brent ~$80 by year-end if Strait stays open. Key threshold: 60-70% of pre-war oil flows needed for surplus expectations. Billy Leung (Global X): 'Gold is the interesting outlier here.'

articles.title: Crude Oil Price — June 15, 2026
articles.headline: Crude oil plunges 5% to two-month low on US-Iran peace deal
articles.author: Trading Economics
articles.summary: WTI $80.19 (-5.53%), Brent $82.96 (-5.01%). Monthly: -23%. Yearly: +14%. All-time high $147.27. US-Iran peace deal reopening Strait of Hormuz. Trump announced oil shipments from Persian Gulf could resume. Q2 forecast $85.57, 12-month forecast $100.45. Related: natural gas $3.04 (-2.59%), gasoline $2.94 (-3.71%).

articles.title: China Shanghai Composite Stock Market Index — June 15, 2026
articles.headline: Shanghai Composite rises 1.61% to 4,096 as peace deal lifts sentiment
articles.author: Trading Economics
articles.summary: Shanghai Composite +1.61% to 4,096.47, CSI 300 +2.39% to 4,891.71. Zijin Mining +7.63%, Zhongji Innolight +8.36%. PetroChina -2.41%, CNOOC -4.62% on lower oil. China data awaited: industrial production, retail sales, unemployment.

articles.title: Gold Price — June 15, 2026
articles.headline: Gold rises 2.77% to $4,339 — defies risk-on selloff
articles.author: Trading Economics
articles.summary: Gold $4,338.90 (+2.77%). Monthly: -4.99%. Yearly: +28.21%. JPMorgan bullish: $6,000/oz average in late 2026, $6,300 in 2027. Gold's rally in risk-on session signals market hedging deal failure.

articles.title: Supermicro Announces Pricing of Equity and Equity-Linked Financing Transactions To Fund AI Orders
articles.headline: SMCI prices $7B equity raise for $39B AI server order backlog
articles.author: Super Micro Computer, Inc.
articles.summary: SMCI prices $7B total equity raise: 45.45M common shares at $27.50 ($1.22B net, closed Jun 12); 75M depositary shares at $50 ($3.68B net, closes Jun 15); $1.25B ATM through JPM/GS/Citi. Purpose: fund components for ~$39B AI server orders from 20+ customers. Preferred: 7.0% mandatory convertible, mandatory conversion by Jun 2029.

articles.title: Earnings Calendar and Analysis for This Week (June 15-19)
articles.headline: Earnings week: Jabil spotlight, Accenture/Kroger Thursday, Juneteenth Friday closed
articles.author: Karee Venema
articles.summary: Mon: PLAY ($0.60 est, after close). Tue: WLY ($1.65), LZB ($0.82). Wed: JBL ($3.10, +21.6% YoY) — spotlight, $8.61B revenue est, +65.3% YTD, AI data center demand; KMX ($0.96). Thu: ACN ($3.72), KR ($1.58). Fri: Markets closed for Juneteenth.

articles.title: Strategy (MSTR) Sells 32 Bitcoin, First BTC Sale Since 2022
articles.headline: MSTR sold 32 BTC to fund preferred stock distributions; BTC below $72K
articles.author: Bitcoin Magazine
articles.summary: Strategy (MSTR) sold 32 BTC — first sale since 2022 — to fund distributions on preferred stock STRC. Bitcoin slipped below $72,000, down ~3%. Company holds 663K+ BTC with ~$12.4B in unrealized gains. Previously bought 1,550 BTC for ~$107M (week of Jun 1-7).

articles.title: Salesforce Appoints Guy Wanger as Chief Accounting Officer
articles.headline: CRM appoints new CAO effective June 15, 2026
articles.author: Simply Wall St
articles.summary: Salesforce announced appointment of Guy Wanger as Chief Accounting Officer and Principal Accounting Officer, effective June 15, 2026. Analyst consensus: 39 analysts, average target $259.26, range $160-$400.

articles.title: Broadcom Inc. Stock Holdings Increased by Landscape Capital Management
articles.headline: Landscape Capital boosts AVGO stake 207.9% in Q4
articles.author: MarketBeat
articles.summary: Landscape Capital Management increased AVGO holdings by 207.9% in Q4 to 7,686 shares. AVGO Q2 earnings (Jun 3): revenue +48% YoY, driven by custom AI chips including Google TPU. Analysts raising price targets despite post-earnings share decline.

articles.title: Weekly Market Recap – Week Ending June 12, 2026
articles.headline: S&P 500 +0.6% for the week; Nasdaq +0.7%
articles.author: MCapital Management
articles.summary: S&P 500 +0.6% for the week ending June 12; Nasdaq Composite +0.7%; Dow Jones Industrial Average also positive. Stocks clawed back losses after falling as much as 1.5% intraweek on Iran deal optimism.

articles.title: Gold rebounds on US-Iran peace hopes, JPMorgan bullish outlook
articles.headline: JPMorgan: Gold could average $6,000/oz in late 2026, $6,300 in 2027
articles.author: MSN
articles.summary: JPMorgan projects gold averaging $6,000/oz in late 2026, with potential to reach $6,300 in 2027, despite recent market volatility and peace deal speculation.

articles.title: Fed Signals Shift At June Meeting With Markets Pricing In 2026 Hike
articles.headline: Fed may drop easing bias at June meeting, setting up potential 2026 hike
articles.author: Simon Moore
articles.summary: Fed may drop its easing bias at the June meeting as inflation stays high and jobs remain strong. Sets up possibility of 2026 rate hike. New Chair Kevin Warsh's first press conference will be closely watched.

articles.title: RIVN Stock Surges 20% Pre-Market On Upgrade
articles.headline: Rivian jumps 20% pre-market on analyst upgrade following Q4 beat
articles.author: StockTwits
articles.summary: Rivian (RIVN) shares jumped more than 20% in pre-market trading on Friday June 12 after analyst upgrade. Q4 loss of $0.66/share. Robust 2026 delivery forecast driven by R2 launch.

articles.title: CBOE Volatility Index (VIX) — June 12, 2026 Close
articles.headline: VIX closes at 17.78 on Friday, down 9.1%
articles.author: Sigmanomics
articles.summary: CBOE Volatility Index (VIX) closed at 17.78 on June 12, 2026, down 9.10% from prior close of 19.56. Gold volatility index (GVZ) at 28.33, down from 32.18.
